scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n lint,lint:libs,typecheck,magic-numbers,replit-independence,migration-guards,spinner-contrast,production-image,types-mirror "pnpm run check:lint" "pnpm run check:lint:libs" "pnpm run typecheck" "pnpm run check:magic-numbers" "pnpm run check:replit-independence" "pnpm run check:migration-guards" "pnpm run check:spinner-contrast" "pnpm run check:production-image" "pnpm run check:types-mirror"
